section.houseRulesSubtitle: You’ll be staying in someone’s home, so please treat it with care and respect.

html.htmlText:
HOUSE RULES -

Below house rules are to be followed at all the times. Any violations in the below rules will result into immediate cancellation of the booking without any refund

# Smoking, vaping, e‑cigarettes strictly prohibited
# Parties, loud music and events are strictly prohibited
# Commercial photography and filming strictly prohibited
 # Use of drugs/substance abuse is strictly not allowed.
# Please respect the fact that this is a residential building. Keep the noise levels within the apartment to the minimum. Do not speak loudly in the corridors/elevators.
#  Only registered guests are permitted on the premises. Any additional visitors must be approved by the host in advance.
# Guests must comply with all local laws and regulations during their stay.
#We are required by law to have information ready about the guests staying at our apartments. We therefore ask all guests to complete a registration form at check-in. Foreign nationals will be required to upload visa and passport details.


Additional Notes -

#  Guests are responsible for keeping the property clean and in a good condition during their stay. Any damages must be reported to the host immediately.
# Money and other valuables brought in the premises are the sole responsibility of the guests
# Guests are expected to use utilities (water, electricity, etc.) responsibly and conserve energy whenever possible.

htmlDescription.htmlText:
This Stylish and Spacious 3bhk apartment is perfect for Group/Family trips and Get Togethers. Located in a quiet neighborhood in the heart of BKC, it is perfect for people visiting for events (Jio World or MMRDA) / work purposes or Visa services (VFS) in BKC. It’s also close to Siddhivinayak Temple and Shopping Areas like Linking Road and Santacruz.

The space
The Space comes with a Queen Sized 3 seater L Shaped Sofa Cum Bed + 2 Seater Sofa + two 1 seater comfortable chairs in the living room. There are 3 bedrooms with Queen Beds each in two bedrooms and King Bed in one of the bedrooms. Each bedroom has a dedicated wardrobe and mirror. Additional floor mattresses can be provided and the place can comfortably sleep 8 people. There's free parking available in the basement of the building.

There is a Small Games Zone for Children in the Living Room with Air Hockey and Dart Games.

The Flat comes with all amenities such as High-Speed 200mbps Wifi, Smart HDTV (43in) with OTT Platforms, Dining Table, Dedicated Workspace, Fully Automatic Washing Machine, Gas Stove, Microwave, Toaster and Electric Kettle.

All necessary cookware such as pots and pans are provided. Sufficient plates, bowls and cutlery are also present. Basics such as Tea, Sugar, Salt and Coffee are available too.

All bathrooms include towels, napkins and toiletries such as hand wash, body wash, shampoo and conditioner.

Guest access
Entire Apartment

Other things to note
We provide a Daily Cleaning Service to ensure that your stay is comfortable. Fresh towels and hand towels are provided every alternate day. For our long-term guests, please note that we change bed linens every 4 days.

All guests are assigned a dedicated guest relationship manager whose contact details will be provided during check in.

Additionally the guest can reach out to the host at any time.

Our team is familiar with English, Hindi, Gujarati, Marathi and Sindhi language.
